title: Data residency
content:
Data residency
Manage where model inference runs and where data is stored with geographic
controls.
Copy page
This feature is eligible for Zero Data Retention (ZDR). When your organization has a ZDR
arrangement, data sent through this feature is not stored after the API response is
returned.
Data residency controls let you manage where your data is processed and stored. Two
independent settings govern this:
The  parameter controls where model inference runs for a speciﬁc API
request. Add it to any  call.
Value Description
Default. Inference may run in any available geography for optimal
performance and availability.
Inference runs only in US-based infrastructure.
ShellInference geo: Controls where model inference runs, on a per-request basis. Set via
the  API parameter or as a workspace default.•
inference_geo
Workspace geo: Controls where data is stored at rest and where endpoint processing
(image transcoding, code execution, etc.) happens. Conﬁgured at the workspace level
in the Console.•
Inference geo
inference_geo
POST /v1/messages
"global"
"us"
API usage
Administration and monitoringData residency

curl https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages \
    --header "x-api-key: $ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" \
    --header "anthropic-version: 2023-06-01" \
    --header "content-type: application/json" \
    --data '{
        "model": "claude-opus-4-6",
        "max_tokens": 1024,
        "inference_geo": "us",
        "messages": [{
            "role": "user",
            "content": "Summarize the key points of this document."
        }]
    }'
